.128 J Street o Suite 620 o Sacramento. CA 95814-2329
\916) 322-5660 . Fax (916) 322-0886
June 19. 2008
Maria Armoudian
Commissioner
Environmental Atfairs Cornmission
City of Los Angeles
10950 Haskell Ave.
Granada Hills, CA 91344
Yourr Request for Advice
Our File No. W-08-091
Dear Ms. Armoudian:
If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel
This correspondence is written confirmation that the Fair Political Practices
Commission has withdrawn your June 6, 2008, request for advice under the provisions of
the Political Reform Act,l as you requested on Juni 17, 2008. Consequently, no response
will be prepared. Your request is withdrawn.
../2
By: Brian G. Lau
Counsel, Legal Division
BGL:jgl
' The Political Refirrm Act is contained in Government Code Sections 81000 through 91014. All
statutory ret'erences are k) the Government Code. unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair
Rrlitical Practices Commission are contained in Sections lti I l0 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California
Code of Regulations. All regulatory ref'erences are to Title 2, Division 6 of the Califitrnia Code of
Regulations. unless otherwise indicated.
ql",

sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no Q/C sections. Requester requested withdrawal on June 17, 2008, and FPPC confirmed on June 19, 2008. No legal question or conclusion exists because the request was withdrawn before analysis.
